calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Clinton O'Keefe Killian, Esq., for the Plaintiff West Coast Property Management
Tai Chi sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant Chris Baldo.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is forfeited.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1755 Van Ness Avenue, #604, San Francisco, CA 94109
Part due Rent/ and or damages: $2, 831.22.
Attorney's Fees $0,00
Costs $355.00
Total judgment is $3,186.22, less security deposit of $1,150.00 for a Total Judgment of $2,036.22

Judgment signed in open court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2013 Assigned To Trial Court
